cases.prompt_body: Upper launch-tower service level before dawn, one engineer proxy in a weather jacket stands at a side-mounted terminal inside the tower, natural human body proportions, medium full-body side profile, the rust-orange external tank fills nearly the entire opening behind him like a wall, only dark interior tower framing at the edges, no visible booster, no visible sky, no exterior scaffolding, terminal screen unreadable and dim, cold damp air, sodium work light, restrained documentary tension

Documentary tower-console warning shot, one lone technical worker at a compact side console inside launch steel, preserve native human scale and console proportions, the exterior beyond the catwalk is almost entirely the orange external tank surface, no visible booster, no visible sky, no outside tower lattice, no horizon, operator and console anchored to the right side, cold prelaunch air, procedural stillness
